response.justification: Candidate has solid full-stack engineering experience across roughly 14-16 years but lacks the AI/ML depth, director-level technical leadership, and recognized AI product expertise required for a Principal Engineer AI Strategy role. Recent AI exposure is limited to MCP tooling work at current employer, with no demonstrated AI platform building, advanced degree, or strategic advisory experience.
strengths: Long tenure with broad full-stack and infrastructure exposure
Some recent AI-adjacent work on MCP and agentic tooling
Track record of founding and sustaining an open-source platform
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or recognized AI products
Lacks director-level IC or strategic advisory experience
No advanced degree or deep cloud-platform strategy background

key_factors.factor: AI expertise gap for AI Strategy role
